package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for byte_string_conversion_in_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Byte-to-string or string-to-byte conversion observed inside loops in short-lived lookup or append paths.
type CaseByteStringConversionInLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseByteStringConversionInLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseByteStringConversionInLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseByteStringConversionInLoopModel
}

type CaseByteStringConversionInLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseByteStringConversionInLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseByteStringConversionInLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeByteStringConversionInLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseByteStringConversionInLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "byte_string_conversion_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    byte_string_conversion_loop_negative := map[string]int{"byte": 1, "string": 2, "conversion": 3, "loop": 4}
    byte_string_conversion_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    byte_negative_0 := byte_string_conversion_loop_negative["byte"] + len(input)
    _ = byte_negative_0
    string_negative_1 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_1
    conversion_negative_2 := byte_string_conversion_loop_negative["conversion"] + len(input)
    _ = conversion_negative_2
    for loop_negative_3Index, item := range items { byte_string_conversion_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_3Index }
    return nil
}
